form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start by 1.2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:08.50) beating Marty The Martian in 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on April 9 at $3.50. Sure to be in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing in great heart. Last start by 1.2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:08.50) beating Marty The Martian in 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on April 9 at $3.50. Sure to be in the finish again.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well back in the run when 6th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 17 m by Welease Woddewick (2:07.60) in 3yo+ NR 53 to 59 on April 1 at $34. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.4 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr5) held up early, at this track (2:10.60) beating Luvn Osman in Up to 3 LTW on March 25 at $2.40. Could be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Caught wide early and restrained to the rear of the field.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 4 m by Docta Feelgood (2:08.50) in 3yo+ NR 54 to 62 on April 9 at $8.50. At his previous start good run despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 19 m by Miss Froufrou (1:55.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 65 on March 30 at $4. Forward performance expected.

Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 12 m by Sensationalize (1:55.30) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better M on April 4 at $21. Better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in resulting in its sulky wheel striking a marker approaching the 300.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1660m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 1.2 m by Mikis Joe (1:56.00) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 11 at $4.80. Before that, 8th (Sr1) over 2138m at Albion Park beaten 35 m by Fate Awaits (2:30.10) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 4 at $41. Has ability and can do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced by the tiring Studleigh Mark.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track. Last start posted a big 12 m win as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:30.20) beating Little Hoofananny in 3yo+ NR 46 to 53 on April 9 at $1.30. Expected to measure up again.
